content.decision: Repository renamed from copilot-core to leo-core. CLI command renamed from copilot-core to leo. LEO = Living Ecosystem Orchestrator.
content.context: The project evolved from a generic 'copilot' concept into a distinct product with its own identity. The name LEO emerged organically — it was already the name of the Manager of Managers agent, and the acronym Living Ecosystem Orchestrator captures the neural KB architecture. The rename signals product intent.
alternatives_considered: Engram — taken (2.4k stars on GitHub, closest competitor)
Keep copilot-core — too generic, doesn't signal product identity
impact: GitHub repo: vmarinogg/leo-core (redirect from copilot-core active)
CLI command: leo (with copilot-core kept as bin alias for compatibility)
All internal references updated, RDDs keep historical references
